category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Iraq.

title.en: China-to-Iraq EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入伊拉克：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入伊拉克：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Iraq COSQC / Ministry of Electricity (MoEL) requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, grid stability and backup-power considerations for Iraq's 230/400 V 50 Hz network, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与伊拉克COSQC / 电力部（MoEL）要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、伊拉克230/400 V 50 Hz电网稳定性及备用电源考量、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與伊拉克COSQC / 電力部（MoEL）要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、伊拉克230/400 V 50 Hz電網穩定性及備用電源考量、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Iraq, the confirmed practical gaps are: IEC-based safety and EMC evidence required for COSQC conformity and Ministry of Electricity (MoEL) coordination (IEC 61851-1, IEC 61851-23 for DC); connector hardware redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) and CCS2 (DC), since Iraq's IEC-aligned direction is physically incompatible with GB/T connectors; COSQC conformity assessment and pre-shipment inspection confirmation; and grid instability planning since Iraq's 230/400 V 50 Hz network suffers frequent outages requiring hybrid or backup power provisions in deployment design. Iraq's EV market is very nascent and there is no single confirmed mandatory national EV charger certification programme published from official sources as of 2026-06-14; exporters must confirm the current COSQC conformity route, MoEL coordination requirements, HS code, charger type, and project approval path before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入伊拉克时，已确认的实务差距包括：COSQC合格评定和电力部（MoEL）协调所要求的IEC体系安全及EMC证据（IEC 61851-1，直流产品为IEC 61851-23）；由于伊拉克IEC体系方向在物理上与GB/T接口不兼容，须将接口从GB/T 20234改为IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS2（直流）；COSQC合格评定及装运前检验确认；以及电网不稳定规划——伊拉克230/400 V 50 Hz电网频繁停电，部署设计中须考虑混合或备用电源方案。伊拉克电动汽车市场仍处于非常初期阶段，截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认已发布的单一强制性全国EV充电桩认证计划；出口商应在出货前核实当前COSQC合格评定路径、MoEL协调要求、HS编码、充电桩类型和项目审批路径。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入伊拉克時，已確認的實務差距包括：COSQC合格評定和電力部（MoEL）協調所要求的IEC體系安全及EMC證據（IEC 61851-1，直流產品為IEC 61851-23）；由於伊拉克IEC體系方向在物理上與GB/T接口不兼容，須將接口從GB/T 20234改為IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS2（直流）；COSQC合格評定及裝運前檢驗確認；以及電網不穩定規劃——伊拉克230/400 V 50 Hz電網頻繁停電，部署設計中須考慮混合或備用電源方案。伊拉克電動汽車市場仍處於非常初期階段，截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認已發布的單一強制性全國EV充電樁認證計劃；出口商應在出貨前核實當前COSQC合格評定路徑、MoEL協調要求、HS編碼、充電樁類型和項目審批路徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, COSQC scope determination, Ministry of Electricity approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, project developers, and installers should verify current Iraq conformity assessment rules, MoEL project requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、COSQC适用范围裁定、电力部批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、项目开发商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行伊拉克合格评定规则、电力部项目要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、COSQC適用範圍裁定、電力部批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、項目開發商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行伊拉克合格評定規則、電力部項目要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
